svg.title: Linear algebra cheat sheet showing scalar, vector, matrix, shape, dot product, matrix multiplication, and transpose with their ML meaning
svg.desc: A vertical flow diagram building from scalar (single number) to vector (list of numbers) to matrix (table of vectors), then showing shape rules, dot product calculation, matrix multiplication as repeated dot products, and transpose flipping rows and columns.
svg.text: Multiply pairs, then add. Result = one number (one prediction)

g.text: Dot product repeated for every row
